title: Speck Pasta Bake
description: A German-inspired pasta bake filled with tangy flavors and crispy speck. Perfect for a hearty lunch.

ingredients.name: creamy sauce
ingredients.notes: such as ricotta or sour cream

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook the speck over medium-high heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the tangy sauce, creamy sauce, and cooked pasta. Stir until well combined.
Add the cooked speck and stir until coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated Parmesan (if using).
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
